caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap with a logo is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a black professional microphone. His shirt features the white printed text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He wears black over-ear headphones. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and various framed photographs and clothing racks are visible on the walls and in the room. Two logos appear as overlays on the screen: a circular logo on the left and a red "BOLLY TOSI" logo on the bottom right. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his expression and posture, moving from speaking actively to tilting his head back with a skeptical look, and finally looking downward toward the microphone. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up throughout the scene.
